code:
const AsyncFunction = Object.getPrototypeOf(async function(){}).constructor;
const item = {"summary": "PH: Recruiter sends message - recipient receives it and recruiter sees it in the panel", "labels": "M3,VS1", "wiki": "h2. User story

*As a* recruiter
*I want* to send and see the outbound appear in-thread with correct state
*So that* I trust the system of record (transcript: sent/delivered tags; audit)

h2. Scenarios

h3. Scenario 1: Happy send shows in panel

*Given* a valid compose
*When* I send
*Then* the message appears in the thread with sent state
*And* the recipient receives the email on the mail path

h3. Scenario 2: Send succeeds but delayed state update

*Given* the provider acknowledges slowly
*When* I send
*Then* UI shows pending/processing state until acknowledgement

h3. Scenario 3: Duplicate send idempotency

*Given* I double-tap Send accidentally
*When* the client debounces or server dedupes
*Then* only one logical message is created

h2. Definition of Ready

||Criterion||Any blocking issues to being ready / Notes||
|We understand the value this work provides to customers and how it supports the product vision.| |
|We have clearly defined, understand, and agree on the Acceptance Criteria.| |
|We have no blocking open questions.| |
|There are no dependencies blocking completion.| |
|We agree on the Manual and Automation testing approach.| |
|We agree on the customer documentation impacts.| |
|We have relatively sized the Story.| |
|We can complete the Story according to our Workday Definition of Done in a sprint.| |
|We have documented our discussions and the key decision points.| |
|We have discussed toggles| |

h2. Notes

* Figma design: [2-Way Email Recruiting - MVP designs|https://www.figma.com/design/HpAOHGAeXBORpHnyhsCMja/2-Way-Email%5FRecruiting%5F12%5F2024?node-id=6913-20249&t=z4GjQzGKwojLlwJw-1]
* PRD: [2-Way Email PRD doc|https://docs.google.com/document/d/13JkI%5FkUlyz6JfLDuEfSyheLPZ6K-P%5FoMP9ZeoHcvG%5Fw/edit?usp=sharing]"};
const AC = "||ID||Acceptance Criteria||Test Owner||Test  ID||
| | | | |
| | | | |
| | | | |";
const labelStr = (item.labels || '').trim();
const labels = labelStr ? labelStr.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean) : [];
const body = {
  fields: {
    project: { key: 'HRREC' },
    summary: item.summary,
    description: item.wiki,
    issuetype: { name: 'Story' },
    components: [{ name: 'Candidate Two-Way Messaging' }],
    assignee: { name: 'david.denham' },
    labels,
    customfield_10006: 'HRREC-82977',
    customfield_15100: [{ id: '122500' }],
    customfield_23317: AC,
  },
};
const res = await jira('/issue', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(body) });
const text = await res.text();
let data;
try { data = JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { data = { raw: text }; }
return { ok: res.ok, status: res.status, summary: item.summary, data };
